# Alex Y. Lin

> Personal knowledge base of Alex Y. Lin — Computer Science Lead at the Belldegrun Center for Innovative Leadership at Brentwood School in Los Angeles, CA. This site collects my background, research, projects, and the classes I teach. Each page below links to its raw Markdown, which is the cleanest form for an LLM to read.

## Pages

- [About](https://alexlinyx.com/content/about.md): Who I am — background, interests, education, and work history
- [Research](https://alexlinyx.com/content/research.md): Research projects and publications
- [Projects](https://alexlinyx.com/content/projects.md): Personal and side projects

## Work — Brentwood School (BWS)

- [BWS](https://alexlinyx.com/content/bws.md): My work as Computer Science Lead at Brentwood School
- [Classes](https://alexlinyx.com/content/classes.md): Classes I teach

## Contact

- Email: alin@bwscampus.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/alexlinyx
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/alex-y-lin-293757190
- Substack: https://alexlinyx.substack.com/
